ModDescription: Sells Silver/Gold Dalia Badge, Gold Spellbook and Silver Centrum in the Knickknack Shack Treasure Trade tab for Knickknack Vouchers, unlimited stock - with each item cost configurable in Configure Mod (0 removes the item from the shop). Tables are generated from vanilla data at every launch; nothing on disk is modified. Restart the game after changing a setting. Built for Endless Ragnarok 2.0.
